project_ref.name: 13.75 MW wind power project in Davangere, Karnataka, India

fields.description: Grid-connected renewable energy project (hydro / wind / biomass / solar) claiming avoided-emissions credits by displacing fossil-fired grid electricity. Post-Paris additionality for utility-scale renewables is widely questioned in the literature (West et al. 2023, CMW 2023).
fields.monitoring_approach: Metered electrical output cross-checked against grid dispatch records.
